api_key.description: GNews API key. Sent as the 'apikey' query parameter on every request; never logged.

base_url.description: GNews API base URL override for tests or proxies.

query.description: Keyword search query for the 'search' stream (required by GNews search; defaults to 'news' when unset, matching legacy's harmless-default fallback). Also used as the 'top_headlines' stream's query when top_headlines_query is unset.

top_headlines_topic.description: Optional GNews topic filter (e.g. 'technology', 'business') for the 'top_headlines' stream.

top_headlines_query.description: Optional keyword query for the 'top_headlines' stream, overriding the shared 'query' value for that stream only.

in.description: Optional GNews 'in' filter restricting which article fields are searched (e.g. 'title,description').

nullable.description: Optional GNews 'nullable' filter naming fields allowed to be null in the response.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound for the 'from' filter; only articles published at or after this time are read on a fresh sync.

end_date.description: RFC3339 upper bound sent as the 'to' filter.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-100), sent as GNews's 'max' parameter.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
